name: Nera – Instant Win Rules
author: Nera
upgrade_notice: Update to the latest release for bug fixes and compatibility with Lottery for WooCommerce.

sections.description:
Instant win rule types (instant, scheduled, ticket sold %), public prize visibility, and optional instant-win UI overrides for Lottery for WooCommerce.

Requires the Lottery for WooCommerce plugin to be installed and active.
sections.installation:
Install and activate Lottery for WooCommerce, then install this plugin and activate it.

Configure instant win rules and visibility from the product editor as provided by your theme and Lottery for WooCommerce.
